projectDescription: An automated TypeScript API documentation generator for webpack that extracts type definitions from webpack's types.d.ts and produces Markdown and HTML documentation deployed to GitHub Pages.
keyFeatures: Automated TypeScript API documentation extraction from webpack's types.d.ts
Custom TypeDoc plugins for namespace merging and type-map generation
Custom doc-kit Markdown theme with stability annotations (@deprecated, @experimental, @beta, @legacy)
Scheduled GitHub Actions workflow to sync with the latest webpack main branch every 24 hours
Converts TypeDoc Markdown output to HTML via @node-core/doc-kit
Deploys generated HTML documentation to GitHub Pages automatically
